introSection: Ladybug Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Carousel Gardens Amusement Park in New Orleans, Louisiana, USA. It opened on February 28, 2015. It replaced the SBNO Liveoak Ladybug, which had not operated since Hurricane Katrina.
fullText: Ladybug Roller Coaster is a steel roller coaster located at Carousel Gardens Amusement Park in New Orleans, Louisiana, USA. It opened on February 28, 2015. It replaced the SBNO Liveoak Ladybug, which had not operated since Hurricane Katrina.
